creator: wollman@rayovac.lcs.mit.edu
text:
The BIND 8.1.2 port does not install the documentation.  named(8)
	helpfully refers users to the configuration guide ``included with
	this BIND distribution'', but of course it is not.

Fix: 

install the documents
How-To-Repeat: 
	pkg_add bind-8.1.2.tgz
	man named
	fgrep doc /var/db/pkg/bind-8.1.2/+CONTENTS
